items.name: Bone Collector Earrings
items.description: Upcycled earrings made from minx jawbones.
items.long-description: These earrings are part of the scavenger's collection, upcycled from used jewelry, including minx jawbones. Perfect for those who appreciate the unusual and the unique.

items.name: Friends 5ever Earrings
items.description: Upcycled earrings made from thrifted fastener buttons.
items.long-description: Friends 5ever! As a part of the scavenger's collection, these earrings are upcycled from used jewelry and thrifted fastener buttons. A subtle play on classic friendship jewelry, this pair is just what you're looking for--whether shared between friends or kept as a personal treasure.

items.name: Forever In Bloom Earrings
items.long-description: The scavenger's collection proudly presents these fantastically fairy-like earrings. Made from upcycled jewelry, this pair is made for the ethereal.

items.name: Ecclectic Necklace
items.description: Upcycled necklace made from a variety of materials.
items.long-description: The show stopper from the scavenger's collection is here! Crafted using a total of 18 unique charms, this necklace pairs well with any whimsical style.

items.name: Don't Forget Me Earrings
items.long-description: As the final item to the scavenger's collection, this pair of earrings ties up beautifully the art of upcycled jewelry. A classic look for anyone particularly fond of red.

items.name: God Complex Tank Top
items.description: Upcycled tank top with isopod print
items.long-description: Feeling like god? Like rolly pollys ? This shirt might just be for you. Wear a tank top that says I am invincible and has a picture of an isopod on it. Do it.
